name: astryx-dev-journey-storybook
$comment: Runnable Storybook fixture for the Astryx developer-journey exhibit. A designer/dev can `npm i && npm run storybook` and SEE the Astryx flagship components — the React+CSS+stories the ds-contracts CLI emits from examples/astryx/contracts. Layout mirrors evals/fixtures/storybook-skeleton (the journey-engineer eval fixture); versions pinned to the reference repo devDependencies.
